# 🐛🔀 PR Template — New Destination Guide Submission

> **Before submitting, read our [Contributing Guide](guides/contributing.md) and [Submission Template](guides/submission-template.md).**

---

## 📋 Summary

**Destination:** [e.g., Svalbard, Norway]
**Bug Score (0–10):** [e.g., 1/10]
**Best Season:** [e.g., Mar–Jun; Sep–Nov]
**Budget:** [e.g., $$–$$$]

---

## 🔍 What I Verified

- [ ] Checked [Research Updates](guides/research-updates.md) — no conflicts with existing data
- [ ] Cross-referenced [Seasonal Safety Calendar](guides/seasonal-safety-calendar.md) — no seasonal conflicts
- [ ] At least **2 independent sources** cited
- [ ] Bug claims are specific (not vague "it's fine")
- [ ] Destination isn't already covered (checked for duplicates)

---

## ⚠️ Warnings & Traps

- [ ] **Trap 2:** [e.g., "Local islands in Maldives are risky even if resorts are safe"]
- [ ] **General Warning:** [e.g., "Always verify within 12 months of booking — climate change shifts insect ranges"]
